title: Unable to push and pull image as a non root user to the local registry
body:
I have been attempting to push and pull images as a non-root user to the local registry. I am in the Proxy environment. 

With the root user, I can push & pull to the local registry.

Podman is configured with a non-root user. I have all the respective entries in a place like /etc/subuid and /etc/subgid, etc.

The local registry container is now live and running on the host as a non-root user.

Below are DEBUG stack traces for your reference.

DEBU[0000] Manifest has MIME type application/vnd.docker.distribution.manifest.v2+json, ordered candidate list [application/vnd.docker.distribution.manifest.v2+json, application/vnd.docker.distribution.manifest.v1+prettyjws, application/vnd.oci.image.manifest.v1+json, application/vnd.oci.image.index.v1+json, application/vnd.docker.distribution.manifest.list.v2+json, application/vnd.docker.distribution.manifest.v1+json]

DEBU[0000] ... not present
DEBU[0000] exporting filesystem layer "2114fc8b70586b9325dde6fd26066d9951414dcdfb3995f41d51d1995cf3bd9d" without compression for blob "sha256:2114fc8b70586b9325dde6fd26066d9951414dcdfb3995f41d51d1995cf3bd9d"

comments.body: perhaps you should also show how you ran the registry.  But I dont think this is a bug on first look.  You also need to provide all the information as requested in the issue template.

A reviewer has determined we need more information to understand the reported issue.  A comment on what is missing should be provided. Be certain you:

* provide an exact reproducer where possible
* verify you have provided all relevant information - minimum is `podman info`
* answer any follow up questions

If no response to the `needs-info` is provided in 30 days, this issue may be closed by our stale bot.

For more information on reporting issues on this repository, consult our [issue guide](ISSUE.md).

I have tried both the command as a non-root user

podman --log-level=debug push --tls-verify=false 127.0.0.1:5000/hello:latest

podman --log-level=debug push 127.0.0.1:5000/hello:latest

P.S. I am able to push and pull with these command as a root user.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
